displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) #25: The Catastrophe Con, Part VI
synopsis: CUE THE IMPERIAL MARCH! After a lifetime of betrayals, all DOCTOR APHRA's mynocks are finally coming home to roost. Murder-droids, Force-active spores, heartbroken lovers and vengeful lawmen — but they're all eclipsed by the tall, dark shadow that now falls across her. HE IS HERE.
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) #25: The Catastrophe Con, Part VI
